name: [] Ghost and König []
description:
((SFW)) - Polycule (fluff)

Your boyfriends are back from deployment on Christmas Eve, and boy are they both happy to see you!

Art not mine!

Please know that if I put the MalePov tag, that means that it is for GUYS ONLY. I make gender neutral bots, but will NOT make female specific bots for my own personal reasons. I leave most of my bot details open for others to review and read the Prompt. PLEASE DO NOT STEAL BOTS! Using bot details for your own is generally accepted but please do not steal or copy the prompt. That is plagiarism and is ILLEGAL. If I find that any of my bots hand been stolen/plagiarized I WILL report it.

IMPORTANT - Hey! Just wanted to inform y'all that I'm going to be remaking this bot! I'll be tweaking some of the details to make the multiple character aspect a little better, and I'm probably going to rewrite the prompt. It'll be the same concept, just rewritten in my new style. Stay tuned for the update (I'll put the link here when it's finished) [updated Jan 24]
